raw_output: {"http_records": [{"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8000/users?q=test&page=1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "List users with search"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:8000/users", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"test\", \"email\": \"test@example.com\"}", "notes": "Create user"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8000/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "Get user by ID"}, {"method": "PUT", "url": "http://localhost:8000/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"name\": \"updated\"}", "notes": "Update user"}, {"method": "DELETE", "url": "http://localhost:8000/users/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000"}, "notes": "Delete user"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8000/health", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000"}, "notes": "Health check"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8000/items?category=electronics&limit=10", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "List items with filter"}, {"method": "POST", "url": "http://localhost:8000/items", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Content-Type": "application/json"}, "body": "{\"title\": \"Test Item\", \"price\": 9.99}", "notes": "Create item"}, {"method": "GET", "url": "http://localhost:8000/items/1", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000", "Accept": "application/json"}, "notes": "Get item by ID"}, {"method": "OPTIONS", "url": "http://localhost:8000/config", "headers": {"Host": "localhost:8000"}, "notes": "Config options"}]}
